mainEntity.name: Does UU Game Booster work on GL.iNet routers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Many GL.iNet routers can run the UU OpenWrt router plugin because GL.iNet firmware is OpenWrt-based, provided the router has compatible architecture support, internet access, and TUN support.
Yes. Install kmod-tun and verify /dev/net/tun exists before troubleshooting the UU plugin itself.

mainEntity.name: Can this accelerate Nintendo Switch, PlayStation, and Xbox?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The router plugin can accelerate supported gaming devices behind the router, including consoles and handhelds that cannot run a desktop client.

mainEntity.name: Is UU Game Booster the same thing as a VPN?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. UU Game Booster is focused on supported game acceleration and route optimization, not general-purpose VPN privacy or full-network tunneling.

mainEntity.name: Why does the UU app not discover my router?

acceptedAnswer.text: Common causes include the phone being on cellular instead of router Wi-Fi, the router not being in normal router mode, the LAN bridge not behaving as expected, or the UU service not running.
